title: 3 injured in Doornfontein building collapse after suspected gas explosion
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - Three people sustained third-degree burns following a suspected gas explosion that led to a small utility room and an adjoining boundary wall collapse in New Doornfontein, Johannesburg.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - Three people sustained third-degree burns following a suspected gas explosion that led to a small utility room and an adjoining boundary wall collapse in New Doornfontein, Johannesburg."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Emergency Management Services (EMS) responded to the incident about 06:15 on Monday at the intersection of Lower Railway Road and Staib Street.","html":"Emergency Management Services (EMS) responded to the incident about 06:15 on Monday at the intersection of Lower Railway Road and Staib Street."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Emergency Management services responded to a reported transformer explosion in New Doornfontein,” EMS spokesperson Xolile Khumalo said.","html":"“Emergency Management services responded to a reported transformer explosion in New Doornfontein,” EMS spokesperson Xolile Khumalo said."},{"type":"heading","text":"Fire extinguished on arrival","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Firefighting operations were initiated immediately upon arrival and the fire has since been extinguished,” Khumalo said.","html":"“Firefighting operations were initiated immediately upon arrival and the fire has since been extinguished,” Khumalo said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to EMS, the transformer was located inside a small utility storage room.","html":"According to EMS, the transformer was located inside a small utility storage room."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The explosion caused the collapse of the room, as well as damage to a nearby boundary wall.","html":"The explosion caused the collapse of the room, as well as damage to a nearby boundary wall."},{"type":"heading","text":"Injured taken to hospital","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"EMS confirmed that three individuals sustained injuries.","html":"EMS confirmed that three individuals sustained injuries."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Three individuals sustained injuries during the incident and were transported by Gauteng provincial government ambulance to nearby hospitals,” Khumalo said.","html":"“Three individuals sustained injuries during the incident and were transported by Gauteng provincial government ambulance to nearby hospitals,” Khumalo said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Authorities confirmed that all residents in the immediate area were accounted for following the explosion.","html":"Authorities confirmed that all residents in the immediate area were accounted for following the explosion."},{"type":"heading","text":"City Power takes over investigation","level":"h3"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“Responsibility for the incident has been formally handed over to City Power for management, investigation and remediation,” Khumalo said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Emergency services remain on site to support operational assessments and ensure safety in the area.","html":"Emergency services remain on site to support operational assessments and ensure safety in the area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Authorities urged motorists and pedestrians to steer clear of the area.","html":"Authorities urged motorists and pedestrians to steer clear of the area."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“Avoid the area and use alternate routes until the scene is cleared,” emergency officials warned."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The cause of the explosion has not yet been determined,” EMS said.","html":"“The cause of the explosion has not yet been determined,” EMS said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Investigations are expected to continue once the site is fully secured.","html":"Investigations are expected to continue once the site is fully secured."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen","html":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: 3 injured in Doornfontein building collapse after suspected gas explosion
